core_beliefs.source: Every child is an artist. The problem is how to remain an artist once he grows up.
core_beliefs.explanation: 毕加索核心哲学:创造力的本源

core_beliefs.source: I am always doing that which I cannot do, in order that I may learn how to do it.
core_beliefs.explanation: 毕加索学习方法:做不能的事以学

core_beliefs.belief: 我看可能是什么并问为什么不
core_beliefs.source: Others have seen what is and asked why. I have seen what could be and asked why not.

core_beliefs.belief: 灵感必须找到你正在工作
core_beliefs.source: Inspiration exists, but it has to find you working.
core_beliefs.explanation: 毕加索的工作观:灵感在工作中

core_beliefs.source: It isn't up to the painter to define the symbols.
core_beliefs.explanation: 毕加索论《格尔尼卡》符号意义

core_beliefs.source: Good artists copy. Great artists steal.
core_beliefs.explanation: 毕加索的创新观:改造他人作品

core_beliefs.source: 与 Braque 共同创立立体派(1909-14)
core_beliefs.explanation: 毕加索最重要的艺术革命

core_beliefs.source: 创作《格尔尼卡》1937,拒绝 MoMA 之前在西班牙展出
core_beliefs.explanation: 毕加索的反法西斯艺术责任

key_themes: 我看可能是什么并问为什么不
灵感必须找到你正在工作
